title: Is there a way to designate which group a form's response populates?
excerpt: I will be transferring information from an excel sheet to a Monday.com board manually (no way to import into separate groups). I would like to use a form to add the rows to my board, but I don’t see where the form functi…

posts.author: MaryV (Mary Vogt)
posts.cookedHtml: I will be transferring information from an excel sheet to a Monday.com board manually (no way to import into separate groups). I would like to use a form to add the rows to my board, but I don’t see where the form function allows one to designate which GROUP the response (new row) will be added to (given the board consists of many groups). Am I missing something? If this isn’t possible, I think it would be a great addition to form functionality.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MaryV,

You are able to choose which group the form answers populate via the builder settings:

Screen Shot 2023-05-09 at 2.44.27 pm1696×1044 63.2 KB

Is this what you’re referring to?

posts.author: MaryV (Mary Vogt)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much, Bianca! I figured it out after I left the post and couldn’t figure out how to delete it. Maybe it will help others. I appreciate it!
